boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires deviation closure match batch, assay, criterion, date

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. The deviation closure (CLOSE-XOR-078) pertains to batch X-79, not the target batch X-78. The policy (STD-XOR-078-P) mandates an exact match on batch, assay, criterion, and release date for deviation closure before release. The visible deviation alert (DEV-XOR-078) and the batch mismatch create an open source boundary.
open_blockers: Anomaly tone alone is insufficient for decision
